## [00:00 - 02:32]

Hey, Deepash here. So if you're looking at this video, you'll know what the title is and it's about support. There are different levels of support available depending on which program you're on. So if you're on the BPM method program, you get access to a private Facebook group for members. This is the do-it-yourself online version of the training program where it's self-taught and self-paced. That means you learn it at your own pace and in a format that makes sense for you using our step-by-step guides. And then you have access to the student group. The student group contains people that have been through the program, people that have been through it. Probably, you know, some people have been on the program for years. Some people are fairly new. But the more you share, the more other people share and the more likelihood you're able to get the support you need from existing students. So I absolutely use that group to learn from others, to get support from others and also motivate others as well. So if you want support and you're on the BPM method online program, that's the place to go to get the best support. If you're in the Elite Accelerator program, we have weekly Q&A calls as well as the private Facebook group. So you can post in the group and myself, my team of coaches and also other students will be there to help you. But more specifically, we will be running Q&A calls every week. So really turn up to those, use those to get the direct support, the feedback on creatives, the ad, the copy, your funnels, anything like that. That's what the calls are there for. And then thirdly, if you have any kind of general or specialist need support, then you can contact the team as well. So if you, for example, are having technical problems or you have a suggestion or you have an idea or something and you want to contact me or my team, you can do that directly as well. The links to the BPM method student group, the Elite Accelerator group and also to email us are below. So check the links out, check out the information on how to get in touch. If you are contacting the team via email, we try and kind of get back to you as fast as we can, but it can take up to three days to respond to general support calls. Just through the volume of inquiries we receive. However, we do try and respond as fast as possible. And that's why I do recommend that you go into the Facebook groups for more kind of direct support, if and when you can.
